notes: Planning artifact from 2026-05-06. Edge comp_orchestrator->dec_tailoring_fail_defer was replaced with comp_orchestrator->req_defer_tailoring_on_failure for strict typing.

nodes.label: Overnight job prep pipeline
nodes.description: Unattended discovery and ranking, deduped persistence, tailored resume PDFs and packets; human submits.

nodes.label: Multi-board ingestion
nodes.description: Collect listings from multiple boards with per-site behavior.

nodes.label: Authenticated sources
nodes.description: Ingest boards requiring login (LinkedIn, Wellfound).

nodes.label: Dynamic pages and bot friction
nodes.description: Handle JS rendering and conservative anti-bot operational practices.

nodes.label: Persistent deduplicated store
nodes.description: SQLite-backed normalized storage with stable dedupe keys across runs.

nodes.label: Profile relevance filtering
nodes.description: Filter/rank jobs vs skills, seniority, preferences with explainability.

nodes.label: Tailored resume PDFs
nodes.description: Per relevant job, emit a tailored PDF from DOCX + structured tailoring.

nodes.label: Application packet artifacts
nodes.description: Cover letter + structured answers/cheatsheet files for human submission.

nodes.label: Unattended execution with recovery
nodes.description: Retries, checkpoints, resumability, summarized run reports.

nodes.label: Offline scraping validation
nodes.description: Fixture tests validate parsing/plans/tailoring without live sites.

nodes.label: Defer tailoring failures
nodes.description: If tailoring invalid/UI/session fails, mark job deferred and continue pipeline.

nodes.label: Human submits applications
nodes.description: No autonomous application submission.

nodes.label: Conservative automation defaults
nodes.description: Small batches, strict per-domain throttles, jitter/backoff, periodic manual refresh.
nodes.rationale: Operator preference to reduce account risk.

nodes.label: Playwright storageState on disk
nodes.description: Persist sessions; if missing/invalid, run a headed login helper once.
nodes.rationale: Standard Playwright approach for authenticated scraping.

nodes.label: Host refresh + shared volume
nodes.description: Host-run refresh writes storageState into a directory mounted into Docker.
nodes.rationale: Most reliable macOS Docker ergonomics for interactive login.

nodes.label: Local Docker packaging
nodes.description: Batch pipeline container + mounted volumes for DB/state/templates/artifacts.

nodes.label: Python + Playwright
nodes.description: Python services, Playwright automation, pytest.

nodes.label: SQLite database
nodes.description: SQLAlchemy + Alembic migrations on a mounted volume.

nodes.label: ChatGPT web UI tailoring
nodes.description: Playwright drives ChatGPT UI; parse model output into validated JSON matching iface_tailored_artifact.

nodes.label: Defer jobs on tailoring failure
nodes.description: If tailoring invalid/UI/session fails, mark job deferred and continue pipeline.
nodes.rationale: Preserves overnight progress vs hard failure.

nodes.label: DOCX template canonical resume
nodes.description: Mounted DOCX defines layout; renderer fills placeholders.

nodes.label: LibreOffice headless DOCX to PDF
nodes.description: Container includes LibreOffice for conversion after DOCX population.
nodes.rationale: Pragmatic fidelity path in Linux containers.

nodes.label: MVP boards
nodes.description: LinkedIn + Wellfound + one public ATS-style board page.
nodes.rationale: Bounded v1 scope across auth + semi-standard pages.

nodes.label: LLM-assisted scrape planning
nodes.description: LLM proposes iface_scrape_plan from snapshots; executor validates before persistence.
nodes.rationale: Layout heterogeneity without infinite hand-written selectors.

nodes.label: Planner inputs are DOM/a11y snapshots
nodes.description: Trimmed HTML + accessibility tree JSON as the primary planner context.
nodes.rationale: Cheaper, more testable than vision-first; vision can be a later escalation.

nodes.label: Normalized job record
nodes.description: Canonical listing record after validation.

nodes.label: User profile model
nodes.description: Filtering + tailoring inputs.

nodes.label: Tailoring payload
nodes.description: JSON validated before rendering.

nodes.label: Scrape execution plan
nodes.description: Replayable steps with validation gates.

nodes.label: Page capture bundle
nodes.description: Snapshot inputs for planner/testing.

nodes.label: DOCX mapping contract
nodes.description: Template path + placeholder mapping rules.

nodes.label: Pipeline orchestrator
nodes.description: Stages, checkpoints, retries, run summary, per-site circuit breakers.

nodes.label: Rate limit policy
nodes.description: Per-domain quotas, concurrency caps, jittered backoff.

nodes.label: Playwright scrape executor
nodes.description: Capture snapshots, execute validated plans, normalize jobs, debug artifacts.

nodes.label: LLM scrape planner
nodes.description: Produces iface_scrape_plan from iface_page_capture via shared ChatGPT UI client.

nodes.label: Persistence layer
nodes.description: Dedupe upserts, run/job state, deferred reasons.

nodes.label: Relevance scoring
nodes.description: Explainable scoring vs profile; thresholds configurable.

nodes.label: DOCX fill + PDF export
nodes.description: docxtpl/python-docx fill; LibreOffice headless export.

nodes.label: Packet assembler
nodes.description: Writes markdown/text files for cover letter + answers.

nodes.label: ChatGPT UI client
nodes.description: Shared queued automation for planner+tailing; enforces JSON schema validation; supports deferral.

nodes.label: Bot detection + policy
nodes.description: Boards may block automation; terms/account risk.

nodes.label: ChatGPT UI fragility
nodes.description: UI changes and account friction break automation.

nodes.label: Unsafe scrape plans
nodes.description: LLM plans may misfire without strong validation.

nodes.label: Docker-on-Mac auth ergonomics
nodes.description: Mis-mounted state breaks sessions.

nodes.label: Session expiry mid-run
nodes.description: Forced re-auth during long runs.

nodes.label: DOCX/PDF fidelity
nodes.description: Complex templates may not convert perfectly.

nodes.label: Conservative posture chosen
nodes.description: Throughput traded for fewer aggressive signals.

nodes.label: Host volume session sharing works
nodes.description: storageState visible in container with stable paths.

nodes.label: Sessions last for batch slices
nodes.description: Given throttles + smaller batches.

nodes.label: ChatGPT storageState works unattended until expiry
nodes.description: After initial headed setup.

nodes.label: DOCX template matches renderer conventions
nodes.description: Placeholders compatible with docxtpl rules.

nodes.label: LibreOffice conversion stable in container
nodes.description: Fonts/template features supported well enough.

nodes.label: Normalization fixture tests
nodes.description: HTML/JSON fixtures to iface_normalized_job.

nodes.label: Scrape plan replay tests
nodes.description: Captured iface_page_capture + plan to expected extracts (no network).

nodes.label: Tailoring schema conformance
nodes.description: Golden model outputs validate against JSON Schema; stub driver tests.
